prs.title: Fix docs.rs extensions README providing invalid `Cargo.toml` snippet
Fix for the text overflow bug seen  in the `text_debug` example.
Unpack bins belonging to multidrawable batch sets on the GPU instead of on the CPU.
Non-linear color spaces for compositing 2d sprites
Fix depth prepass with msaa on webgpu
Replace bevy_image::Volume with a pixel_count helper function
only log once GPU preprocessing support
fix transform-gizmo frame delay, system ordering
Fix material slot overflow in bindless slab
Make failed image loads result in a failed Gltf load.
Fix PostProcess orderings for fog and wireframes
`bevy_settings` release note: Add thank you for crate ownership transferral
Enable partial bindless on Metal and reduce bind group overhead (#18149)
Fix errors when disabling gpu clustering
Update Android game activity to be compatible with android-activity v0.6.1
Remove cmake and `dummy.cpp` in Android example
Add `RenderScheduleOrder` resource to allow for `RenderApp` `Schedule` changes
Fix the behavior of `NoCpuCulling` when toggled at runtime.
Don't extract visible entities for lights with shadow mapping disabled.
Next Generation Scenes: Core scene system, `bsn!` macro, Templates
Add and remove accessibility toggled properly for Checkable
Remove `ui` from the `2d` and `3d` feature collections
make batch set creation unconditional on drawing mode
Make an unsafe accessor for SystemSchedule::systems
Improve fullscreen material example and add WebGL2 padding
`editable_text`: more keys and keyboard shortcuts, placeholder Clipboard support
Factor the slab allocator out of the mesh allocator, and make it generic.
Add storage buffers limit check for gpu occlusion
Relax reflected math ops restriction from `Reflect` values to `PartialReflect` values
Refactor moving entity to new table
Restore support for arbitrary errors in `EntityCommandError`
Make release content show up first in reviews
Consume the release events for keyboard presses mapped to `TextEdit`s
Fix upscaling blend state auto-detection using render order instead of query iteration order
Clear view upscaling pipelines on render recovery
Minimal unstyled Text Input with Parley
Fix application freezing on macOS when `trace_tracy` is enabled
Make CPU visibility systems ignore meshes tagged with `NoCpuCulling` entirely.
Change the order of arguments to `load_erased`.
messages sent by winit are now reflected
Update bevy_remote client example: print and exit
Update default error handler to use `Severity`.
Fix panic when root UI nodes are parented
Make the AI Policy more visible to newcomers
Write Messages by Bevy Remote Protocol
MeshAllocator: Take padding elements into account in the MeshBufferSlice's range
Fix spot and point light retained view entity
Make passing in the type registry for scene ser/de explicit.
Refactor `section_buffer` from tuple to named struct
Fix: DespawnOnEnter/OnExit/When can trigger for same state transitions

Replace the tuple used for text run metadata with a named struct
Allow serializing and deserializing handles during reflection.
Add `DespawnWhen` helper component for more complex state despawning logic
Ensure the previous mesh input buffer is nonempty.
Pick root text entity when pointer is above a text node but not pointing at text.
Reduce panics in rendering code to facilitate render recovery
bugfix: recompute inherited visibility when ChildOf component is removed
Enable modification of AnimationClips in glTF processing
mobile example set naga log level to info
Add Clearcoat support to the G-Buffer
Introduce sparse buffer uploads for mesh input uniforms.

Add Copy trait to Pickable component
Derive Reflect for ParsedPath and its children
Implement a relationship between Windows and Monitors.

Deploy Docs - Build Docs step: Resolve most Warnings

Stop doing full table scans of joints in skin extraction.
Fix Solari flickering by ordering solari_lighting
do not scrape type_data example, causes ICE
Add SliderOrientation to control slider axis detection
Added touch input for the FreeCameraPlugin.
Optimize entity removal by scanning from the end

Multi-draw sorted render phases if the platform supports it.

mention extendedmaterial in the stdmat docs

fix: process window position before size in changed_windows
Don't let the clustering vertex shader see any read-write storage buffers.
Fix energy loss in multi-scattering term

Delete warning message about corrupted writes.
Allow accessing subassets using their handle.
